response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content: Identified a music performance and spoken commentary. 2. Identified song title: '天誅 & mercy' from the album 'DISASTERPIECE', performed by Mori Calliope feat. 10-FEET. 3. Used web search to find full lyrics for '天誅 & mercy'. 4. Divided the video into scenes based on music performance and commentary.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by VTuber Mori Calliope, performing her song "天誅 & mercy" (featuring 10-FEET), followed by spoken commentary about the production and details of the concert. The song is from her album "DISASTERPIECE".

scenes.description: Mori Calliope performs the song '天誅 & mercy' on stage with a backdrop of a digital Sakura tree and neon text that reads 'DISASTER PIECE' and 'CALLIOPE'. The performance includes dancing and singing. The song features 10-FEET.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope speaks directly to the audience about the production, the Sakura tree backdrop, and the difficulty of performing the song live.
Mori Calliope continues to talk about the camera and the detailed 3D model, laughing as she interacts with the audience.
